threats.title: Customer Account Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker could impersonate a legitimate customer to place
fraudulent orders or access their order history.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Web Application Server Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker might set up a fraudulent web server to phish user
credentials or intercept sensitive data.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Fraudulent Order Repudiation
threats.description:
A customer could deny placing an order if insufficient logging and non-
repudiation controls are in place.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Customer to Staff Privilege Escalation
threats.description: A customer could exploit a vulnerability to gain unauthorized access to Barista, Manager, or Administrator functionalities.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Customer Account Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker could impersonate a legitimate customer to place
fraudulent orders or access their order history.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Order Data Tampering
threats.description:
An attacker could modify order details (e.g., items, quantities, prices,
status) in transit or at rest.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Web Application Server DoS
threats.description: An attacker could flood the Web Application Server with excessive requests, making it unavailable.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Customer Account Tampering
threats.description: An attacker modifies or corrupts data stored in MongoDB, such as changing user information, altering records, or injecting malicious data into collections. This can happen due to weak access controls, lack of input validation, or unsecured database connections.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Customer Data Leak
threats.description: Sensitive data stored in MongoDB is exposed to unauthorized users. This may occur due to misconfigured database permissions, lack of encryption, or publicly accessible database instances.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Staff Account Spoofing
threats.description: An attacker could impersonate staff to manipulate order statuses, access sales reports, or modify menu items and application configurations.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Staff Action Repudiation
threats.description: Staff members (Barista, Manager, Administrator) could deny performing actions if audit logs are insufficient, not immutable, or can be tampered with.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Barista/Manager to Administrator Privilege Escalation
threats.description: A Barista or Manager could exploit a vulnerability to gain Administrator privileges.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A
